title: Senior Teacher - upGrad Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - upGrad Asia Pacific Associates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad Asia Pacific Associates in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad Asia Pacific Associates:
upGrad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad Asia Pacific Associates!
